showcase_description: Type-safe translations, pluralization, date/number formatting, and language switching with Paraglide JS.
type_safety_desc: All message keys are compile-time checked with full IntelliSense support. Missing keys or wrong parameters cause build errors, not runtime errors.
sample_text: This text is translated based on the current locale.
locale_strategy: Detection order: URL prefix → Cookie → Base locale (English)
errors_auth_required: You need to sign in to continue.
errors_auth_forbidden: You don't have permission to do that.
errors_auth_session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors_validation_failed: Some fields are invalid. Please review and try again.
errors_validation_length: The length is out of range.
errors_resource_not_found: We couldn't find what you're looking for.
errors_resource_conflict: That conflicts with something that already exists.
errors_resource_gone: This resource is no longer available.
errors_rate_limited: Too many requests. Please slow down.
errors_idempotency_key_reused: This request has already been processed.
errors_upstream_unavailable: An upstream service is unavailable. Please try again.
errors_upstream_timeout: The request timed out. Please try again.
errors_internal: Something went wrong on our end.
auth_login_subtitle: Sign in to access your dashboard
auth_login_check_email_body: We sent a sign-in link to
auth_login_terms: By signing in, you agree to our terms of service.
auth_login_error_magic_link_failed: Couldn't send the magic link. Please try again.
auth_login_error_otp_failed: Couldn't send the code. Please try again.
auth_verify_error_resend_failed: Couldn't resend the code. Please try again.
notif_mention: You were mentioned in a discussion
notif_security: New login from a new device
admin_feedback_journey_no_events: Session linked, but no events recorded (events may have been cleaned up).
admin_feedback_journey_no_consent: No journey linked — this user did not consent to analytics tracking.
admin_feedback_delete_dialog_description: This permanently removes the message. There's no undo.
admin_feedback_lede: Submissions from /feedback. Click a row to view detail and journey.
admin_flags_empty_description: Create your first flag to start controlled rollouts.
admin_flags_dialog_delete_description: Permanently delete flag "{key}"? This cannot be undone.
admin_analytics_consent_caveat: Counts reflect consented sessions only. {rate}% of {total} sessions have analytics consent.
admin_analytics_trend_aria_label: Pageview trend for the last {range} days
admin_audit_empty_filtered_description: Try adjusting the filters or clearing them.
admin_audit_empty_description: Admin actions will appear here once they occur.
admin_posts_empty_description: Blog posts will appear here once they are created.
admin_posts_delete_dialog_description: This will soft-delete the post. It can be recovered from the database.
admin_posts_unpublish_dialog_description: This will remove the post from the public site and set its status to archived.
admin_users_empty_description: Users will appear here once they register.
admin_users_ban_dialog_description: This will revoke all active sessions for this user.
admin_jobs_empty_description: Add jobs to the registry in src/lib/server/jobs/index.ts.
admin_jobs_history_empty_description: Trigger a job manually or wait for the next scheduled run.
admin_notifications_delivery_empty_desc: Notifications will appear here when sent.
admin_notifications_field_body_hint: Displayed as plain text. No formatting.
admin_notifications_field_schedule_hint: Leave both blank for an immediately active, permanent announcement.
admin_notifications_critical_alert_desc: Critical announcements cannot be dismissed by users. They remain visible until you deactivate this announcement.
admin_notifications_active_empty_desc: Create an announcement to notify all users.
admin_notifications_deactivate_dialog_de: All users will stop seeing this announcement immediately.
admin_tags_domains_empty_desc: Create a domain to organize blog posts by subject area.
admin_tags_categories_empty_desc: Create a tag to organize your blog posts.
admin_tags_dialog_create_domain_desc: Add a new domain to organize blog posts.
admin_tags_dialog_create_category_desc: Add a new category for blog posts.
admin_tags_delete_tag_desc: Delete tag "{name}" and unlink it from {count} posts.
admin_tags_delete_domain_desc: Delete domain "{name}" and unset it from {count} posts.
admin_db_alert_desc: One or more infrastructure providers could not be reached. Check configuration or retry.
admin_db_neo4j_unavailable_desc: Could not connect to graph database.
admin_db_neo4j_storage_note: Storage metrics not available on free tier —
admin_db_r2_unavailable_desc: Could not connect to Cloudflare R2.
admin_db_r2_analytics_note: Configure CLOUDFLARE_ANALYTICS_TOKEN for detailed request metrics.
admin_branding_lock_identity_desc: When locked, all visitors see your brand. When unlocked, visitors explore random styles.
admin_branding_identity_hint: Visual identity is unlocked — changes will be saved but visitors will still see random styles.
admin_branding_unsaved_changes_confirm: You have unsaved changes. Leave anyway?
admin_cache_redis_unavailable_desc: Redis is not configured or unreachable.
admin_cache_no_keys_prefix_desc: No keys match this prefix filter.
admin_cache_error_load_keys: Failed to load keys. Redis may be unavailable.
admin_cache_flush_showcase_desc: Delete all keys with the showcase: prefix. Safe — only affects demo data.
admin_cache_flush_ratelimit_desc: Delete all keys with the ratelimit: prefix. Warning: This resets all rate limits immediately.
admin_cache_dialog_delete_key_desc: Delete Redis key "{key}"? This action cannot be undone.
admin_cache_dialog_flush_desc: Delete all keys with prefix "{prefix}"? This action cannot be undone.
admin_cache_dialog_invalidate_desc: Clear all in-process caches (feature flags, announcements)? Entries will be re-fetched from the database on next access.
app_account_export_description: Download a JSON file containing all your account data including profile, linked accounts, and sessions.
app_account_delete_description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
app_account_delete_confirm_body: This will permanently delete your account, all sessions, and linked providers.
app_account_delete_confirm_aria: Type DELETE to confirm account deletion
app_notifications_empty_description: You're all caught up. New notifications will appear here.
app_notifications_email_description: Choose which events trigger an email.
app_notifications_telegram_description: Receive notifications via Telegram. Connect your account to enable.
app_notifications_telegram_link_opened: Telegram opened in a new tab. Complete the link there.
app_notifications_discord_description: Receive notifications as Discord DMs. Authorize the app to enable.
composites_locale_fallback_body: This page hasn't been translated to your selected language yet — showing the English original.
showcase_index_description: Feature demonstrations and examples showing the capabilities of the Velociraptor stack.
showcase_index_empty: No published posts will appear here.
showcase_3d_description: Three.js + Threlte 3D demonstrations with GLTF models, animations, and interactive controls.
showcase_viz_description: Chart, plot, diagram, graph, and map components for data visualization.
showcase_viz_card_charts_desc: Bar, line, area, pie, radar, bubble, sparkline, gauge, and treemap charts
showcase_viz_card_plots_desc: Scatter plots and heatmaps for dense data visualization
showcase_viz_card_diagrams_desc: Interactive flow diagrams and state machines powered by Svelte Flow
showcase_viz_card_graphs_desc: Network, directed, and tree graphs powered by D3-force and D3-hierarchy
showcase_viz_card_maps_desc: Interactive maps with markers, popups, and data layers powered by MapLibre GL
showcase_jobs_description: Hosting-agnostic background job system with execution logging.
showcase_jobs_empty_description: Jobs will appear here after their first run.
showcase_forms_description: Form validation patterns with Superforms v2 + Valibot v1.
showcase_forms_contact_field_website_des: Optional. Must start with http:// or https://
showcase_forms_settings_website_descript: Optional. Must start with http:// or https://
showcase_forms_confirm_dialog_descriptio: This action cannot be undone. All items will be permanently deleted.
showcase_forms_wizard_terms_accept: I accept the terms and conditions
showcase_forms_auth_gateway_check_email_: We sent a sign-in link to
showcase_forms_auth_insignia_not_signed_: Sign in to access your account
showcase_admin_data_heading: What we collect, and why it's lawful.
showcase_admin_powers_heading: What the operator can see — and what stops them from doing more.
showcase_admin_powers_section_cant: What the admin can not do
showcase_shell_layout_description: Interactive demonstration of the app shell components and state management.
showcase_cycle_layout_description: Visualize the complete SvelteKit request lifecycle — from user input through server, domain, and database.
showcase_notifications_layout_descriptio: Multi-channel notification system — in-app SSE, email via Resend, Telegram bot, and Discord OAuth2 DM.
showcase_notifications_pipeline_empty_de: Use the Send tab to trigger test notifications.
showcase_auth_layout_description: Better Auth session-based authentication — connection health, session lifecycle, and security diagnostics.
showcase_analytics_layout_description: Privacy-first analytics — page views, user journeys, funnels, and real-time events.
showcase_3d_animated_description: Fox model with switchable animations and orbit controls.
showcase_3d_static_description: GLTF model with orbit controls and directional lighting.
showcase_viz_charts_description: Bar, line, area, pie, radar, bubble, sparkline, gauge, and treemap charts. SimpleChart and Sparkline/Gauge are zero-dependency SVG. The rest use Chart.js or d3-hierarchy.
showcase_viz_plots_description: Scatter plots and heatmaps for dense data visualization. ScatterPlot uses Chart.js; HeatMap is zero-dependency pure Canvas with ResizeObserver, DPI scaling, and design token theming.
showcase_viz_diagrams_description: Interactive flow diagrams and state machines powered by Svelte Flow. Custom themed nodes, edge labels, and zoom/pan controls.
showcase_viz_graphs_description: Network, directed, tree, DAG, Sankey, and knowledge graph visualizations. D3 modules for layout math, Svelte renders all SVG.
showcase_viz_maps_description: Interactive maps with markers, popups, and data layers powered by MapLibre GL. Auto-switching light/dark tile themes.
feedback_lede: Tell us what worked, what didn't, or what you'd like to see. Replies are not guaranteed.
feedback_privacy_title: What we do with your message
feedback_privacy_body: We process your submission to respond to your feedback (lawful basis: legitimate interests, Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR). Messages are retained until you ask us to delete them. You have the right to access, correct, or erase your data — email the controller, or read the full disclosure on the privacy page.
feedback_field_message_placeholder: What happened, what worked, what you'd change…
feedback_field_rating_description: Optional. How would you rate this experience?
feedback_field_email_description: Optional — only if you'd like a reply.
feedback_thanks_body: Your message was saved. If you left an email and we have something useful to say back, we'll reach out. Otherwise, no news = signal received.
